Opportunity by sales person report filter
script:
report = frappe.get_doc("Report", "Opportunity by sales person month wise report")
report.report_type = "Script Report"
report.report_script = """def execute(filters=None):
    user = frappe.session.user
    admin_roles = set(["System Manager", "Administrator", "Sales Manager", "CRM Supervisor"])
    user_roles = set(frappe.get_roles(user))
    is_admin = bool(admin_roles & user_roles)

    columns = [
        {"label": "Sales Person", "fieldname": "sales_person", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 200},
        {"label": "Open",         "fieldname": "open",         "fieldtype": "Int",  "width": 80},
        {"label": "Converted",    "fieldname": "converted",    "fieldtype": "Int",  "width": 100},
        {"label": "Quotation",    "fieldname": "quotation",    "fieldtype": "Int",  "width": 100},
        {"label": "Hot",          "fieldname": "hot",          "fieldtype": "Int",  "width": 80},
        {"label": "Warm",         "fieldname": "warm",         "fieldtype": "Int",  "width": 80},
        {"label": "Cold",         "fieldname": "cold",         "fieldtype": "Int",  "width": 80},
        {"label": "Total",        "fieldname": "total",        "fieldtype": "Int",  "width": 80},
    ]

    if is_admin:
        where_clause = "WHERE MONTH(transaction_date) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND YEAR(transaction_date) = YEAR(CURDATE())"
        values = {}
    else:
        where_clause = "WHERE opportunity_owner = %(owner)s AND MONTH(transaction_date) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND YEAR(transaction_date) = YEAR(CURDATE())"
        values = {"owner": user}

    query = """
        SELECT
            IFNULL(opportunity_owner, 'Unassigned') AS sales_person,
            SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open,
            SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Converted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS converted,
            SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Quotation' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS quotation,
            SUM(CASE WHEN latest_inquiry_status = 'Hot' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hot,
            SUM(CASE WHEN latest_inquiry_status = 'Warm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warm,
            SUM(CASE WHEN latest_inquiry_status = 'Cold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cold,
            COUNT(*) AS total
        FROM `tabOpportunity`
        {where_clause}
        GROUP BY opportunity_owner
        ORDER BY opportunity_owner
    """.format(where_clause=where_clause)

    return columns, frappe.db.sql(query, values, as_dict=True)
"""
report.save()
frappe.db.commit()
print("SUCCESS!")
